basics.description:
**Microsoft Sentinel Multi-Tenant Lighthouse Accelerator**

Delegate one resource group (your Microsoft Sentinel RG) to a service provider / MSSP tenant. All three operator tiers get the same standing access; Tier 3 can elevate just-in-time to Sentinel Contributor and Logic App Contributor.

> Deploy this as an admin of the tenant that OWNS the Sentinel resource group. Select that subscription above, and enter the resource group name below.

basics.name: rgName
basics.label: Target Sentinel resource group name
basics.toolTip: Name of the EXISTING resource group (in the subscription selected above) that contains your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. Only this resource group is delegated.

validations.message: Enter a valid resource group name.

basics.name: mspOfferName
basics.label: Delegation offer name
basics.toolTip: Friendly name shown in the Azure 'Service providers' blade.

basics.name: managedByTenantId
basics.label: Service provider (MSSP) tenant ID
basics.toolTip: GUID of the PROVIDER tenant whose security groups receive delegated access. This is NOT your own tenant.

options.text: Provide the object IDs of three security groups in the provider tenant. All three tiers receive the same standing roles (Sentinel Responder, Sentinel Playbook Operator, Reader). Tier 3 additionally becomes eligible for just-in-time elevation (next step).

elements.name: tier1GroupId
elements.label: Tier 1 group object ID
elements.toolTip: Object ID (GUID) of the Tier 1 operators security group in the provider tenant.

validations.message: Enter a valid group object GUID.

elements.name: tier1GroupName
elements.label: Tier 1 group display name
elements.toolTip: Friendly name shown in the portal delegation view.

elements.name: tier2GroupId
elements.label: Tier 2 group object ID
elements.toolTip: Object ID (GUID) of the Tier 2 operators security group in the provider tenant.

validations.message: Enter a valid group object GUID.

elements.name: tier2GroupName
elements.label: Tier 2 group display name
elements.toolTip: Friendly name shown in the portal delegation view.

elements.name: tier3GroupId
elements.label: Tier 3 group object ID
elements.toolTip: Object ID (GUID) of the Tier 3 operators security group in the provider tenant. This tier also gets the PIM elevation path.

validations.message: Enter a valid group object GUID.

elements.name: tier3GroupName
elements.label: Tier 3 group display name
elements.toolTip: Friendly name shown in the portal delegation view.

options.text: Tier 3 operators can activate these elevated roles on demand (Microsoft Sentinel Contributor and Logic App Contributor). Access is time-bound and revoked automatically when the activation expires.

elements.name: pimDuration
elements.label: Maximum activation duration
elements.toolTip: How long a Tier 3 activation stays active before automatic expiry.

elements.name: pimRequireMfa
elements.label: Require Azure MFA to activate
elements.toolTip: Strongly recommended. When checked, Tier 3 must satisfy Azure Multi-Factor Authentication before an eligible role activates.

options.text: Offboarding safeguard: the provider's Tier 3 group is also granted the built-in 'Managed Services Registration assignment Delete Role'. This role grants NO access to your data or resources — it only lets the provider remove this delegation if you ever stop the relationship without offboarding it yourself. You can still remove the delegation at any time from Service providers > Delegations. (To omit this role, deploy via CLI with includeDeleteRole=false.)
